title: OPSWORDS
description: OP SWORD PLUGIN HAS CUSTOM SWORDS
body:
⚔️ Opswords — Elemental Power Swords Plugin

Opswords brings elemental power to your Minecraft world!
Each player wields a unique elemental sword with special powers — Fire, Water, Ice, Earth, Lightning, and more.
Perfect for RPG servers, PvP battles, or fantasy-themed adventures!

🌟 Features

🔥 Fire Sword — Summons a Piglin warrior wielding a fiery blade!

💧 Water Sword — Summons a Water Guardian to fight alongside you.

❄️ Ice Sword — Summons an Ice Skeleton with a powerful bow.

⚡ Lightning Sword — Unleash thunder strikes on your enemies.

🪨 Earth Sword — Drops deadly dripstone spikes from above.
Each sword has its own unique enchantment, effect, and summoning ability, giving players a distinct combat style.

🧙 How It Works

Players automatically receive an elemental sword when they join the server.

Each sword is bound to an element and cannot be dropped.

Use Shift + Right Click to activate your sword’s special power.

Powers have a 10-second cooldown to prevent spam.

Admins can grant specific swords or reload configuration via commands.

🧾 Commands
Command	Description	Permission
/opswords give <player> <element>	Gives a player a specific elemental sword	opswords.admin
/opswords reload	Reloads the configuration file	opswords.admin
